page: Microsoft Azure M416bs_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the MBSMediumMemoryv3 family. It is powered by dedicated Intel processors, delivering 416 virtual CPUs managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance is equipped with 3800.0 GB of system memory, yielding a ratio of 9.13 GB of RAM per virtual core.

This server configuration does not include any local storage or integrated GPU hardware. Instead, it is designed for block storage performance and is premium storage capable, allowing users to attach high-performance external storage volumes. There are zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this instance.

Given the massive memory capacity of nearly 3.8 TB and the high core count, the M416bs_v3 is optimized for large-scale enterprise workloads. The resource density makes it highly suitable for massive in-memory databases, large-scale enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy data warehousing operations. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the hardware profile represents a high-density resource allocation designed to consolidate massive enterprise workloads onto a single dedicated host, minimizing network latency between compute and memory layers.
description: Microsoft Azure M416bs_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server within the MBSMediumMemoryv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 416 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 3800.0 GB of system memory, providing a memory-to-core ratio of 9.13 GB per vCPU. This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, but it is premium storage capable and optimized for high block storage performance. Designed for massive enterprise workloads, the M416bs_v3 is engineered to support large-scale in-memory databases, data warehousing, and heavy enterprise resource planning applications. Its high-density hardware profile offers qualitative cost efficiency by consolidating massive compute and memory resources onto a single dedicated host, reducing the need for distributed infrastructure and simplifying management of large-scale database systems. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent performance without resource contention.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M416bs_v3 is a memory-optimized server featuring 416 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 3800 GB of RAM, and premium block storage capabilities for large-scale enterprise database workloads.

tagline: A high-density memory-optimized instance featuring massive core counts and premium block storage capabilities for enterprise database workloads.
